active-agents-kpi.description: Count of agents active in the window. SDK: `new Agents(sdk as never).getAll(startTime, endTime)` (positional Dates) → `{ items: AgentListItem[] }`. kpi: return `[{ count: result?.items?.length ?? 0 }]`, set valueField: "count", valueLabel: "active agents" in intent.

defaults.title: Active Agents
defaults.description: Agents with at least one run

agent-consumption.description: Agents ranked by units consumed. SDK: `new Agents(sdk as never).getAll(startTime, endTime, { orderBy: { column: AgentListSortColumn.QuantityAGU, desc: true } })` → `{ items }`. Import AgentListSortColumn from the same subpath.

agent-health.description: Agents ranked by health score (worst first). SDK: `new Agents(sdk as never).getAll(startTime, endTime, { orderBy: { column: AgentListSortColumn.HealthScore, desc: false } })` → `{ items }`. healthScore is 0–100.

defaults.title: Agent Health
defaults.description: Agents ranked by health score — lowest first

agent-memory-timeline.description: Agent memory entries over time. SDK: `new AgentMemory(sdk as never).getTimeline({ startTime, endTime })` (options object — Dates INSIDE it) → BARE array `[{ timeSlice, totalCount, inMemoryCount, ... }]`. Subpath: @uipath/uipath-typescript/agent-memory.

memory-calls-trend.description: Agent memory access volume over time. SDK: `new AgentMemory(sdk as never).getCallsTimeline({ startTime, endTime })` → BARE array `[{ timeSlice, memoryCallsCount }]`.

top-memory-spaces.description: Top memory spaces by entry count. SDK: `new AgentMemory(sdk as never).getTopSpaces({ startTime, endTime, limit: 10 })` → BARE ranked array `[{ memorySpaceName, memoryCount, ... }]`.

defaults.title: Top Memory Spaces
defaults.description: Memory spaces ranked by entry count

policy-denials.description: Governance denials. SDK: `new Governance(sdk as never).getPolicyTraces(startTime, { evaluationResult: [PolicyEvaluationResult.Deny, PolicyEvaluationResult.SimulatedDeny] })` (startTime positional Date, REQUIRED) → `{ items }`. Needs elevated/org-admin access — surface a 403 as a permissions message.

governance-verdicts.description: Allow/Deny/NoOp enforcement breakdown. SDK: `new Governance(sdk as never).getOperationSummary(startTime)` → SINGLE object `{ totalEvaluations, allowedCount, deniedCount, noOpCount }`. fnBody must transform to rows: `return [{ name: 'Allowed', value: s.allowedCount }, { name: 'Denied', value: s.deniedCount }, { name: 'Simulated', value: s.noOpCount }]`.

job-failures.description: Faulted jobs filtered with Jobs.getAll({ filter: "State eq 'Faulted'" }) → { items: [{processName, state, createdTime}] }. template: data-table

defaults.title: Faulted Jobs
defaults.description: Jobs currently in a faulted state

job-completion-trend.description: Successful jobs with Jobs.getAll({ filter: "State eq 'Successful'" }) → { items: [{processName, state, endTime}] }. template: data-table

jobs-duration-threshold.description: Jobs running longer than threshold minutes. SDK: `new Jobs(sdk as never).getAll({ filter: "State eq 'Running'" })` then filter by computed duration `(endTime-startTime)/60000 > threshold`

jobs-by-state.description: Jobs filtered by execution state. SDK: `new Jobs(sdk as never).getAll({ filter: "State eq '${params.value}'" })` → `{ items: [{processName, state, createdTime}] }`

tasks-by-status.description: Action Center tasks filtered by status. SDK: `new Tasks(sdk as never).getAll({ filter: "Status eq '${params.value}'" })` → `{ items: [{title, status, priority, createdTime}] }`

defaults.title: Tasks by Status
defaults.description: Action Center tasks filtered by status

cases-running-above.description: Maestro cases where runningCount > threshold. SDK: `new Cases(sdk as never).getAll()` then filter `runningCount > threshold`

defaults.title: High-Volume Cases
defaults.description: Processes with running case count above threshold

hardRefuse.pattern: invocation volume|consumption timeline|consumption over time|invocations over time
hardRefuse.reason: SDK 1.4.0 has per-agent consumption totals (Agents.getAll → quantityAGU) but no time-bucketed consumption endpoint.
hardRefuse.alternative: agent-consumption (T1 ranked table of per-agent AGU totals), or T3 via Jobs SDK: getAll({ filter: "ProcessType eq 'Agent'" }) bucketed by date for a run-volume trend.

hardRefuse.pattern: agent error|error rate|error trend|error count|error spike|agent failure
hardRefuse.reason: SDK 1.4.0 Agents service exposes list/health/consumption only — no agent error timeline endpoint.
hardRefuse.alternative: T3 via Jobs SDK: getAll({ filter: "State eq 'Faulted' and ProcessType eq 'Agent'" }); or agent-health (T1 — healthScore + lastIncidentType per agent).

hardRefuse.pattern: top failing agent|most errors by agent
hardRefuse.reason: SDK 1.4.0 has no per-agent error counts.
hardRefuse.alternative: T3 via Jobs SDK: getAll({ filter: "State eq 'Faulted' and ProcessType eq 'Agent'" }) grouped by processName; or agent-health (T1) for worst health scores.

hardRefuse.reason: SDK 1.4.0 has no agent latency endpoint.
hardRefuse.alternative: T3 via Jobs SDK: getAll({ filter: "ProcessType eq 'Agent'" }), compute (endTime - startTime).

hardRefuse.reason: The platform tracks AGU/PLTU units, not currency.
Per-agent CPU/RAM is not exposed by any API. (Note: 'Agent Memory' is the memory-entries feature, not RAM.)
hardRefuse.alternative: agent-health (T1) for health scores; agent-memory-timeline (T1) if they meant the Agent Memory feature.

hardRefuse.reason: Job records carry no end-user identity.
hardRefuse.alternative: T3-SDK: new Jobs(sdk as never).getAll({ filter: "ProcessName eq 'x'" }) grouped by processName. For governance events, policy-denials (T1) includes actorIdentityId.

hardRefuse.reason: Dashboards are scoped to one tenant — except governance traces, which support fullOrganization: true (requires org admin).
hardRefuse.alternative: Multi-widget single-tenant view; or T3 Governance.getPolicyTraces(start, { fullOrganization: true }) for org-wide governance data.

hardRefuse.reason: Raw counts only — no SLA metadata in any API.
hardRefuse.alternative: T3-SDK: new Jobs(sdk as never).getAll({ filter: "State eq 'Faulted'" }) to compute failure rate

hardRefuse.reason: No aggregation endpoint for error text or stack traces.
hardRefuse.alternative: T3 via Jobs SDK: faulted jobs expose errorCode/jobError per row (data-table), not aggregated text.

hardRefuse.reason: QueueGetResponse has no failure-count field (id, name, maxNumberOfRetries, … only) — see sdk/orchestrator.md.
hardRefuse.alternative: T3 via Jobs SDK: getAll({ filter: "State eq 'Faulted'" }) grouped by processName for the most-failing processes.
